text.text:
*NEW SLIDE TYPES SIGNALS — 4–10 MAY 2026*

*🔸 Trajectory:*
— Pin on Image: 212 users (WoW +15%), 320 times. 4wk: 📉 fading.
— Idea Board: 322 users (WoW +65%), 663 times. 4wk: 📈 growing.
— Ranking: 345 users (WoW +12%), 568 times. 4wk: 📉 fading.

*🔸 Repeat-use (slides per user, this week):*
— Pin on Image: 1.5
— Idea Board: 2.1
— Ranking: 1.6
— Range across non-quiz interactive slides: 1.5–2.7

*🔸 Adoption rank:*
— Unique users picking (non-quiz interactive): Pin on Image #9, Idea Board #7, Ranking #5
— Unique users picking (all slides): Pin on Image #17, Idea Board #14, Ranking #12
— Responses generated (non-quiz interactive): Pin on Image #8, Idea Board #6, Ranking #7

*🔸 Notable:*
— Ranking #5 on picks but #7 on responses — creators reach for it more than it pulls answers; worth a closer look at completion.
— Idea Board jumped +65% WoW and climbed non-quiz interactive rank #8 → #7 (passed Q&A); also the highest repeat-use of the three new types.
— Ranking also climbed #7 → #5, overtaking Brainstorm and Q&A on picks this week.

<https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards#id=11071959|Dashboard>

blocks.alt_text: Weekly unique users — new slide types vs interactive-slide range
